top_signals.title: Trump administration's limits on student loan forgiveness program are blocked. What to know
top_signals.summary: Trump's policy that narrowed eligibility for a popular student loan forgiveness program will not go into effect, after two federal judges blocked the rule.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Trump got $15,000 in FIFA tickets from Gianni Infantino. Next up: Presenting the World Cup trophy
top_signals.summary: Trump’s ties to FIFA and Gianni Infantino face new scrutiny as the World Cup enters the knockout round and European lawmakers press over a Peace Prize complaint.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 23 April 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Robinhood rolls out public blockchain, plans crypto trading for UK residents
top_signals.summary: The company announced a suite of DeFi products, plans for launching crypto trading in the UK and its public mainnet after months of testing.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Solar generation in CAISO surpassed natural gas in the first five months of 2026
top_signals.summary: In the first five months of 2026, utility-scale solar generation surpassed natural gas generation in CAISO. Solar electricity generation in the California Independent System Operator (CAISO) over the first five months of 2026 increased 21% compared with the same period in 2024, and natural gas generation decreased by 60%, data from our Hourly Electric Grid Monitor shows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
